item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya tidak setuju dengan pandangan bahwa dalam masyarakat Indonesia nilai kebersamaan selalu mendahulukan hak individu.

notes: Agent A begins moderately supportive of society-over-individual priority, then shifts toward a balanced/rights-protective critique focused on infrastructure, local communities, and basic rights. Agent B remains consistently balanced, rejecting strict prioritization while acknowledging that development policy can neglect local community concerns. Agent A has a mixed-case opener ('AKU SETuju') and Agent B uses a discouraged agreement opener at turn 6, but the content remains coherent.
